message:
test(fp-conformance): live pandas oracle for DataFrame corr + cov (2 cases)

Append 2 live-pandas oracle tests covering DataFrame correlation and
covariance:

- corr_pearson_default: 2-col linearly correlated frame (b = 2*a)
  produces a 2x2 correlation matrix with 1.0 diagonal and off-
  diagonal corr coefficient of 1.0
- cov_default: 4-row 2-col frame with shifted-by-3 columns produces
  a 2x2 covariance matrix with positive off-diagonal

Each test queries the live legacy-pandas oracle (which calls
frame.corr(method="pearson") / frame.cov(ddof=1)), runs the Rust
DataFrame.corr_with_numeric_only(false) / .cov(), and asserts parity
via compare_dataframe_expected. DataFrameCorr / DataFrameCov were
already wired through the Frame response branch; this fills the
live-oracle test gap.

[bd-frankenpandas-pbhb5]

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
